name: EthlynSigurdTalk
commands: It's great to see you, too, Ethlyn.{br}Thanks so much for coming.{w}
I just couldn't stay away when I heard of Verdane's attacks...{w}{br}It's such a relief to know you're okay.{w}
Oh, come now.{br}Did you really think I was about to lose to Verdane?{w}

I'd heard that Chalphy barely has any soldiers left behind, given that most of the army is away in Isaac.{w}{br}And let's face it, I can't remember the last time you didn't just leap straight into a crisis without thinking.{w}{br}With Father away at war... I knew I had to come. Someone has to save you from yourself, after all.{w}

Heh heh.{br}Wow, it feels as if I was getting this very lecture only yesterday!{w}{br}I swear, after Mother passed away, it was you who single-handedly kept us in check.{w}{br}Once you went off to marry Quan, we could've sworn that Father finally had a proper little lady for a daughter...{w}{br}But no, nothing's changed after all!{br}I feel so sorry for Quan... Ahahahaha!{w}
Sigurd, I'm only what you and Father made me!{br} If I'm a fusspot, then it's squarely your fault!{w}{br}Perhaps if the two of you hadn't been so unkempt...{w}{br}

Heh, perhaps you're right.{br}Listen, Ethlyn...{w}{br}We might not act like it, but everything you've done means the world to us.{w}{br}I'm so sorry for all the trouble I've always caused you... And thank you so much for coming.{w}
